name:
Memory chip of a COMPUTER!
I took a wrong turn!
description:
I'm in a Memory chip of a COMPUTER!
I took a wrong turn!
hints: This is a humorous dead end. You accidentally entered a computer's memory chip.
Go EAST to return to the large cavern. There is nothing useful here.
notes: Humorous dead-end room (Easter egg). A wrong turn from the large cavern (room 7) west exit. Go EAST to return to the cavern. Scott Adams humor.
